# PR 747 — Wire Review Gate handoff to Phase Architecture v2 helper

## Summary

Wires the Phase Architecture v2 Review Gate handoff helper into `lib/evaluation/processor.ts`.

The processor no longer opens Review Gate from Story Layer readiness alone. It now delegates Review Gate readiness to `buildReviewGateHandoff(...)`.

Review Gate opens only when all required evidence is already present:

- `pass1a_story_layer_v1` exists
- `ledger_quality_report_v1` exists
- Pass 3A is terminal-and-gate-valid

This PR must not synthesize Pass 3A completion proof or degradation proof inside the processor. The processor may normalize legacy status signals, but it must not invent missing proof fields.

## Correct Review Gate Rule

Review Gate is derived from artifacts and durable state, not from hopeful assumptions.

### Ready path

Review Gate may open when:

#### Done Pass 3A

- `pass3a_status = 'done'`
- `pass3_preflight_draft_v1` exists
- `pass3a_completed_at` already exists in progress/state

#### Degraded Pass 3A

- `pass3a_status = 'degraded'`
- Structured degradation proof already exists:
  - `degraded_reason`
  - non-empty `degraded_reason_codes`
  - `degraded_at`

Failed Pass 3A is never Review Gate valid.

## Ready path behavior

When Review Gate is ready, preserve existing handoff semantics:

- top-level `status = queued`
- top-level `phase = review_gate`
- top-level `phase_status = awaiting_approval`
- `review_gate_entered_at` is set
- Story Layer artifact reference is preserved
- quality report artifact reference is preserved

Also persist Phase v2 readiness fields:

- `review_gate_ready: true`
- `gate_ready_status: reviewable`
- `pass3a_gate_validity`
- `pass3a_status`
- `pass3a_artifact_id`
- `pass3a_degraded_reason`, where applicable

## Blocked path behavior

When Review Gate is not ready:

- Do not transition to `review_gate`
- Do not set top-level `phase_status = awaiting_approval`
- Do not stamp `phase1a_batch_state.preflight_status = DONE` unless that was already true in the incoming state
- Log `block_code` and `block_reason`
- Persist safe blocked progress
- Release lease ownership

### Requeue rule

Only non-terminal Pass 3A states should be requeued to `phase_1a`:

- `PASS3A_NOT_READY`
- `PASS3A_HALF_WRITTEN`

Terminal/gate-blocking states should fail closed or require operator recovery instead of looping indefinitely:

- `PASS3A_FAILED_BLOCKING`
- `PASS3A_ARTIFACT_MISSING`
- `PASS3A_COMPLETION_METADATA_MISSING`
- `PASS3A_DEGRADED_PROOF_MISSING`

This prevents an infinite loop:

```txt
phase_1a completes → Review Gate blocks → requeue phase_1a → repeat
```

## What this PR explicitly must not do

This PR must not:

- Synthesize `pass3a_completed_at`
- Synthesize `degraded_reason`
- Synthesize `degraded_reason_codes`
- Synthesize `degraded_at`
- Open Review Gate from Story Layer readiness alone
- Treat failed Pass 3A as reviewable
- Mark blocked preflight as `DONE`
- Change scoring
- Change Phase 2 criteria logic
- Change synthesis
- Change WAVE execution
- Change Quality Gate
- Change Pass 3A runtime extraction
- Change manuscript chunking
- Add provider calls
- Change public WAVE/Revise doctrine copy

## Scope

In scope:

- Wire `processEvaluationJob(...)` through `buildReviewGateHandoff(...)`
- Read existing Review Gate artifacts:
  - `pass1a_story_layer_v1`
  - `ledger_quality_report_v1`
  - `pass3_preflight_draft_v1`
- Derive Review Gate readiness from real artifacts and real progress state
- Persist ready handoff state when Review Gate is valid
- Persist blocked diagnostics when Review Gate is not valid
- Release lease ownership on blocked handoff
- Requeue only non-terminal/not-ready Pass 3A states

Out of scope:

- Public WAVE/Revise copy cleanup
- Scoring
- Phase 2 criteria logic
- Phase 3 synthesis
- WAVE runtime
- Quality Gate
- Pass 3A provider calls
- Pass 3A extraction
- Chunking
- Revise Queue
- TrustedPath

## Tests

Adds/updates coverage for:

- Done Pass 3A with valid preflight artifact and real completion metadata
- Done Pass 3A with preflight artifact but missing completion metadata blocks
- Degraded Pass 3A with structured proof opens Review Gate
- Degraded Pass 3A without structured proof blocks
- Missing Pass 3A blocks
- Running Pass 3A blocks
- `map_done` Pass 3A blocks
- `reduce_running` Pass 3A blocks
- Failed Pass 3A blocks and does not requeue indefinitely
- Processor imports and calls `buildReviewGateHandoff(...)`
- Processor does not synthesize Pass 3A proof fields
- Processor does not stamp blocked preflight status as `DONE`

## Known unrelated test failure

Known unrelated pre-existing failure:

`__tests__/lib/evaluation/processor.real-gate.test.ts`

This suite fails on clean `main` with the same Phase 3 real-gate assertions.

This PR does not modify:

- Phase 3 scoring
- Phase 3 synthesis
- WAVE
- provider behavior
- Quality Gate semantics

This failure must remain explicitly tracked and should not be used as evidence that this PR changed Phase 3 behavior.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Processor no longer opens Review Gate from Story Layer readiness alone.
- [ ] Review Gate readiness is derived through `buildReviewGateHandoff(...)`.
- [ ] Done Pass 3A opens Review Gate only when completion metadata and `pass3_preflight_draft_v1` already exist.
- [ ] Degraded Pass 3A opens Review Gate only when structured degradation proof already exists.
- [ ] Failed Pass 3A never opens Review Gate.
- [ ] Missing/running/half-written Pass 3A does not open Review Gate.
- [ ] Processor does not synthesize `pass3a_completed_at`.
- [ ] Processor does not synthesize `degraded_reason`, `degraded_reason_codes`, or `degraded_at`.
- [ ] Blocked path does not stamp preflight as `DONE`.
- [ ] Non-terminal Pass 3A blockers may requeue.
- [ ] Terminal/gate-blocking Pass 3A blockers fail closed or require operator recovery.
- [ ] Existing artifact writes remain unchanged.
- [ ] Existing Review Gate queued/awaiting approval semantics remain unchanged for valid handoff.
